channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Half a sign missing, 19th March
item.description:
Please replace. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Thorndon Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 Large 30-50 Centimeter pot holes throughout the whole road, 19th March
item.description:
Multiple large potholes from the top, and all the way to the bottom of Cray Valley Road. Please review the entire length of the road to see them all.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53,55, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti on black fence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of Gas Canisters in a Bag, 19th March
item.description:
Dumped on Charmouth Road not far from Tavistock Road junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really long grass!!!, 19th March
item.description:
Hi, I’d like to report the very long grass next to 1 Compton Place. I’ve just come back from the gym and a rat literally jumped at me - I’m writing this shaking and crying omg The grass is extremely overgrown and clearly needs cutting as soon as possible pleaseeeee. It feels unsafe and unpleasant to walk past :( Please could this be addressed urgently? Thank you, Elisabeth
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Manor Road, North End, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car - badly parked and untaxed, 19th March
item.description:
This car has been here for over a month, it looks like it has been in a collision as the air bag has blown. It’s sticking out in the road slightly making it hard for cars to pass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Wren Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on green, 19th March
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 241, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned childs buggy by telephone pole l, 19th March
item.description:
Likely to run downhill and cause damage or accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Christmas Tree, 19th March
item.description:
This discarded Christmas tree has been left out the front of flat since Christmas.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass on the pavement, 19th March
item.description:
The glass is spread over a large area of the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath

item.title: Flyppstering, 19th March
item.description:
Westhorne Avenue junction of Alnwick Road. Remove flypostering from traffic lights

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 49 Alma Street NW5 3DH, 19th March
item.description:
This is a young tree. The straps holding it in place have been removed (?by whom) Can someone please assess if they should be replaced to keep it secure Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Alma Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Vehicle! No Tax or MOT, 19th March
item.description:
VOLVO has dumped for three weeks now with no Tax or MOT!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Hill Crest, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Alnwick Road opposite. L 4. Please clear blocked gully

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham

Alnwick Road on bollard opposite no 4. Remove hraffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham

Alnwick Road by bus stop Opposite Horn Pupe schhol

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alnwick Road, Eltham

item.title: Blocked Drain, 19th March
item.description:
Paxton Crescent junction of Alnwick Road Clear blocked gulky

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fencing left by team dropping kerb, 19th March
item.description:
Fencing left by team who was dropping kerb. It's already more than a week when it's not been removed. It's obstructing parking spaces and causing hazard when falling over on street when windy, it will cause traffic accident and council will be liable for damages, injuries caused as it been reported on couple occasions without results.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 19th March
item.description:
Alnwick Road junction of Mottingham Lane Remove flypostering from post (2)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 500mm square 125mm deep pothole on junction where exit from ambulance station is., 19th March
item.description:
Pothole deep enough to be a hazard to motorcycle paramedics leaving station and cause damage to our vehicles. (Bill on its way to you by the way.)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220, Waterloo Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
